result.text:
🎁 WIN 3 FREE IMAGINATION NFTs!
🚀 Want to win a free NFT from the Imagination collection and join the exclusive holder community? 
Now’s your chance! 🎉
🎯 How to enter?
1️⃣ Like and share this post 📢
2️⃣ Comment below why you want to own an Imagination NFT ✍️
3️⃣ We’ll randomly select 3 winners who will receive a free NFT! 🎟🎉

🏆 Prizes:
🔥 3 x Imagination NFTs (value increasing every month!) 💰
🔥 Access to monthly $Snips rewards!
🔥 Bonus: +20% extra $Snips for purchases before #Snipverse 2.0 launch! 🚀

📌 Winners will be announced in a few days – enter now! ⏳
#NFT #DigitalArt #Web3
